div.p: If the settings page doesn't open, click here
Select a conversation to start messaging.

input.t-att-placeholder: state.msgType == 'internal' ? 'Write an internal note...' : 'Type a message'

div.p: No phone numbers yet. Buy a number
Get a Twilio phone number to use with WhatsApp

div.span: No numbers available. Click "Search Numbers" to fetch from Twilio.

div.p: Prices may vary based on country and number type.
By confirming your subscription, you allow Odoo to charge you for future payments in accordance with their terms.
Create your first subaccount to manage customers separately.
